'''Drup's Companion''' was one of the [[Star/Legends|stars]] of the [[Drup's Star system/Legends|Drup's Star system]], along with [[Drup's Star]], in the [[Saijo sector/Legends|Saijo sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].
